title: Add SP4096 11L432 MLP3x Int6+Zstd Momentum99 record (val_bpb=1.1596)
body:
## Summary
- **New SOTA: val_bpb=1.1596** (prev: 1.1753, Δ=−0.0157)
- SP-4096 tokenizer, 11 layers × dim 432, 3x MLP expansion (relu²)
- Muon momentum 0.99, decoupled WD 0.02, warmdown 3000 iters
- Int6 PTQ (levels=31) + zstd-22, fp16 embedding passthrough
- Sliding-window eval stride=64, 20.3M params → 15.3MB artifact
- 9237 steps in 600s on 8×H100

## Key changes from previous record
| | Previous (1.1753) | This (1.1596) |
|---|---|---|
| Layers | 10 | 11 |
| Dim | 496 | 432 |
| MLP mult | 2x | 3x |
| Muon momentum | 0.95 | 0.99 |
| Warmdown iters | 2500 | 3000 |
| Params | ~19.5M | 20.3M |
